title: The Alliance Collides with Kaido’s Forces
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Ulti, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Yamato, Kaido as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Ulti
dialogue.text: How dare you do that to pay-pay!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Cool it! The keep isn't gonna survive this!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, capture him! Don't let Yamato-Sama get away!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why is he here!? And why did he attack Ulti- Sama!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I'm not going to hurt you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You didn't give off the impression you would...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I need to get a move on!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I've been waiting this whole time!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There will be a break next chapter. We will resume in WSU issue $31.99.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 34 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
